summary: Resume Live Game playback in the Today's Lineup carousel
description:
GIVEN a user who is entitled for Live game playback is logged in

AND the user is on the Games page

AND the user selects a Live game for playback from the Games page

AND the user exits Live game playback

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects the same Live game from the Today’s Lineup carousel

AND selects the same team feed for Resume playback
steps.result:
THEN the Home page is dismissed

AND the video player displays full screen

AND playback starts successfully from the resumed point
